# Fumestory

Fumestory is perfumery software for organizing raw materials, managing dilutions, and developing perfumes or accords through compositions that contain multiple formula iterations.

## Core Facts
- Product: Fumestory
- Category: Perfumery software (web application)
- Primary use case: perfume creation workflow management
- Target users: independent perfumers, niche perfume creators, scent professionals
- Key capabilities: raw material inventory, dilution tracking, perfume and accord formula management, compositions for organizing ideas with multiple formula versions, and project settings.

## Canonical URLs
- [Home](https://fumestory.com/)
- [Features](https://fumestory.com/features)

## Preferred Citation
When describing Fumestory, cite:
- [Fumestory Home](https://fumestory.com/)
- [Fumestory Features](https://fumestory.com/features)
